privacy: LOCAL ONLY — Never share raw faults upstream. Sanitize sensitive incidents to lessons/
description: Operational incident history. Local-only record of system failures, errors, and outages.

schema.category: Category of incident (development-error, infrastructure, state-corruption, api-failure, timeout, etc.)
schema.title: Short description of the fault
schema.impact: What broke, what data was affected
schema.recovery_steps: How it was resolved (or attempted resolution)
schema.references: Links to related code, logs, or documentation
schema.sanitized_lesson_id: If extracted to lessons/, link here
schema.Agent_or_system: Which agent or system component failed

privacy_rules.never_share_raw: Raw faults contain secrets, stack traces, failed credentials
privacy_rules.sanitization_process: Extract root cause + solution → create lesson → sanitize before sharing
privacy_rules.future: ailedger will segregate secrets and allow controlled disclosure

entries.title: Destructive file replace instead of merge: agent replaced agence-install.sh content dropping macOS installer, terraform, azure-cli, awscli, jfrog-cli, tflint packages. Violated Laws 3,4,6 and Rule 8. User caught immediately.

Incorrect merge strategy guidance: previously suggested --strategy-option=theirs (keep remote) instead of -X ours (keep local). This could cause unintended data loss. User caught and corrected before merge. Log as critical guidance error.
